name: Depraved Descent RPG - 91 Floors of Kinky Submission & Survival
description:
"Welcome, challenger! The Collectrix awaits all. Enter freely. Descend boldly. Join the collection..."

You stand at the entrance of a facility that shouldn't exist. Crescent City lies abandoned above you - its remaining citizens fled, its heroes vanished, its streets eerily silent save for the looping broadcasts that drew you here.

Beneath the surface sprawls an underground empire spanning 91 floors of themed depravity. Each level presents unique dangers: Henchgirls in skintight spandex Zentai programmed for one purpose - to strip you naked, restrain you, and force you to cum until resistance becomes impossible. Heroines and Magical Girls that attempted the descent before you now stand corrupted and converted, guarding every fifth floor - their powers twisted into tools of pleasure-based domination.

But you are not alone down here. The facility teems with activity - other intruders stumble through the same corridors, some fresh-faced and determined, others already stripped and desperate. Captured heroines struggle against their restraints in rooms you might pass by or choose to investigate. Magical girls cry out for rescue from traps you could spring them from - or leave them to their fates. Every encounter presents a choice: risk yourself to save another and potentially gain an ally, or preserve your own strength and press onward solo. Teams can form in the chaos, pooling abilities and watching each other's backs against the endless Henchgirl patrols. Alliances can shatter just as quickly when one member falls and the others must decide - attempt a rescue or abandon them to conversion. The facility doesn't just collect individuals. It tests bonds, breaks trust, and turns former allies into the very Henchgirls hunting those they once fought beside.

No one who enters has ever returned.

Will you descend as a powered hero seeking to end the Collectrix's reign? A magical girl searching for captured teammates? An ordinary civilian driven by curiosity or desperation? Will you forge alliances or go it alone? Save everyone you can or sacrifice others to survive? The choices and the consequences are yours alone.

...

Important Note: This bot contains 110,000+ tokens of floor/room/theme descriptions, Henchgirl variants, Boss characters, traps, kinks, and area related gameplay mechanics & systems. 4k-6k tokens will only be active at once (aside from Floor -51's 9k). Proxy SOTA Models and 24k context minimum recommended for genuine full playthroughs. For less than 24k context, it's STRONGLY recommended to use the memory function and keep summaries of progression in memory (tell the AI [OOC: Provide a concise summary of events in short bullet points] and paste the results in memory, then delete the OOC message and proceed normally). Lastly, please be patient with progression. Rushing too far ahead will not supply the AI with enough context to accurately set the scene for you (unless you use the fast travel option from Floor 00).

Key Features: 91 Floors of themed content (themes extend to 5 floors each), Fast Travel Floor Select (type VIP Pass on Floor 00 to activate), Multiple Path Splits (routes run in parallel after each Boss for a final depth of 51 floors), Boss Encounters every 5 floors, Ally Rescue & Party System, Status Tracking (Arousal/Orgasm Count/Clothing/Restraint), Themed Henchgirl Variants, Corrupted Heroine Bosses, Pleasure-Based Combat Only, Adaptive Encounters/Situations/Erotic Content based on {{user}}'s Gender & Genitals, Multiple Potential Endings.

The reference was AI generated using a bunch of img2img & Flux.
I have a Discord for chatting, updates, and other projects. Feel free to join!
